summary: Schema coverage sprint · 7 NEW skills + 8 patches orchestrateurs + 2 NEW schemas R&D activés. Audit coverage v2.57 a quantifié 72% des 115 fields majeurs couverts runtime · 28% orphans. v2.58 ferme 25+ orphans avec ROI massif via 3 strates · (Strate 1) patches orchestrateurs existants pour activer fields v1.10-v1.7 NEW dormants (snapshot-brand v1.3 brand_equity + creative_zone + sustainability + price_per_unit · mine-voc v1.1 benefits.emotional_signal/latency + pain_id/objection_id stables PNT-NN/OBJ-NN · mine-vom v1.1 awareness_distribution + regulatory + seasonality + competitive_comparison · profile-audience v1.4 role.* + behavior.* + objections.severity_score · produce-paid-angles v1.8 response_counter + derived_angle_refs + angle.compatibility[] back-refs · sync-notion-atlas v1.1 friction.cross_refs + roadmap.mix/relations · define-specs v1.2 service_specs + contraindications business_model branch). (Strate 2) D#386 mappers atomiques canon S55 finally shipped post-10-days lag · 5 NEW skills · map-specs (drill composition/nutrition/posology/origin/external_databases) · map-mechanisms (drill 7 deep fields target/mode_of_action/time_window/duration/evidence_level/market_sophistication/triggered_by · canon EFSA/INSERM-driven) · map-benefits (chain functional/emotional/identity + audience_fit cross-link) · map-audiences (cartographie 3 niveaux mère/sous-poche/micro · 4 questions framework canon) · map-angles (cross-product audience × origin_axis · lineage canon copy 4 IDs obligatoires) · decompose-angle (angle.schema design intent honored · 11 atoms canon formula 4 components). (Strate 3) Schemas R&D activés · strategy.schema v1.0 NEW canonical (annual_goals GOAL-NN + current_focus + constraints CST-NN) · learnings.schema v1.0 NEW append-only (LRN-NNNN · 9 kinds canon · cross_refs 6 entities · superseded_by invalidation) · produce-strategy v1.0 orchestrator operator-guided Q&A flow · build-atlas-complete patched canonical strategy.json path (ferme dette technique 10j build-atlas écrivait strategy/roadmap.json sans schema canon). SED §13 v2.58 sub-table appended documente 2 NEW schemas + 4 décisions design (R&D zone ship rationale + learnings fragmentation closure + id patterns cohérence + runtime activation). Backward compat strict additif partout · brands pre-v2.58 sans NEW fields valident, NEW skills n'override aucun existant, schemas R&D activés sans migration breaking. Manifest skills 60 → 67 (+7 NEW). Coverage runtime 72% → ~98% (25+ orphans fermés).
